compiled_state.title: Add Semgrep installation and test quality config to onboarding skill
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description
Update onboarding SKILL.md to include Semgrep installation and test quality gate configuration.

### Steps
1. In plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md, add a Phase 3 step for test quality tooling setup
2. Detect project language(s) and recommend appropriate tools (Semgrep universal, PyNose for Python, eslint-plugin-jest for JS/TS)
3. Add test_quality.tool and test_quality.enabled config keys to the dso-config.conf template
4. Document Semgrep as an optional dependency with installation instructions
5. Graceful degradation: if Semgrep install fails, set test_quality.tool=bash-grep (fallback)
6. Remove .test-index RED marker

### File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md — Edit
- .test-index — Edit (remove RED marker)

## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Onboarding SKILL.md references Semgrep
  Verify: grep -qi "semgrep" plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
- [ ] Onboarding SKILL.md references test_quality config
  Verify: grep -q "test_quality" plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written (existing RED tests verified) ✓
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — Onboarding SKILL.md updated with Semgrep + test quality config. Tests: 6/6 GREEN.
comments.author: Test
